name: daily monitor records the last successful run timestamp to a state file for the next-iteration freshness check
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus fixtures && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf 'sources: []\n' > fixtures/sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources fixtures/sources.yaml --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --state pr-corpus/monitor-state.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"last_run_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' pr-corpus/monitor-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
